race.comment: COOL MOON (9) finally shed the maiden tag at the Gold Coast last time out and will have derived a bunch of confidence from that victory. Can go right on with the job now. SHREDDED (3) has placed over this track and trip, draws low and gets 3kg off with the claim. Ticks a few boxes for a race like this. TRIPLE MALT (4) resuming from a break. Fitter for a recent trial at the Gold Coast. Opened last campaign with a fourth at Sale over 1427m. Can feature. CARBONARA (7) has been in the market at her last couple of starts but hasn't made an impression, last start running fourth at this track. Will look for a better run this time out as an each-way chance.
